case_title: LUCIA MAMPIERI VS. JAMES HERRERA et al

docket_entries.description: WRONGFUL EVICTION, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAMPIERI, LUCIA AS TO DEFENDANT HERRERA, JAMES HERRERA, EVELYN DOES 1 TO 150 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-13-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-17-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-15-2002
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-13-2002 CONTINUED TO OCT-25-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-09-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE A CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT PRIOR TO THE CASE MANAGEMENT. THE OCT-25-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE FILLED BY THE PLAINTIFF;
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HERRERA, JAMES HERRERA, EVELYN
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-09-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
